title: FFL Functional Characterization: Enumerating Feed-Forward Loop Instances and Mapping Semantic Roles in Attribution Graphs
summary: Demo notebook demonstrating Feed-Forward Loop (FFL/030T motif) enumeration and analysis in attribution graphs. Uses 6 synthetic DAG graphs across 6 domains with 28 feature explanations. The pipeline builds igraph objects, enumerates FFLs via adjacency-set lookup, annotates with Cantor-decoded feature explanations, runs layer ordering analysis, semantic role categorization (keyword-based chi-squared test), edge weight coherence analysis, cross-domain Cramer's V, and baseline random triad comparison. Visualizations include FFL vs baseline layer ordering, semantic role distributions by position, per-graph FFL counts, and coherence by domain.
